---
title: "final_countdown"
format: html
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(haven)
```


```{r}
dta <- read_dta("data/marginal-generation-offsets-data.dta")
head(dta)
```

```{r}
library(lubridate)

dta_fmix <- dta %>%
  mutate(
    renew = w + s + h,
    fossil = ff + ng,
    total_gen = renew + fossil,
    fossil_share = if_else(total_gen > 0, fossil / total_gen, NA_real_),
    doy  = yday(dt)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(fossil_share))

ggplot(dta_fmix, aes(x = hour, y = doy, fill = fossil_share)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "A", name = "Fossil share") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(1, 91, 182, 274, 365),
                     labels = c("Jan", "Apr", "Jul", "Oct", "Dec")) +
  coord_polar(theta = "x") +
  labs(
    title = "Fossil vs renewables over the year",
    subtitle = "Circular heatmap: hour of day (angle) × day of year (radius)",
    x = "Hour of day", y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid   = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "right"
  )
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)

dta_prepped <- dta %>%
  mutate(
    total_gen_mw = ff + ng + w + s + h,
    hydro_share  = if_else(total_gen_mw > 0, h / total_gen_mw, NA_real_),
    other_ren    = w + s,
    fossil       = ff + ng,
    fossil_share = if_else(total_gen_mw > 0, fossil / total_gen_mw, NA_real_),
    # tons CO2 per MWh (1‑hr timestep, so MWh ≈ MW)
    co2_t_per_mwh = if_else(total_gen_mw > 0,
                            rh101_co2_masstons / total_gen_mw,
                            NA_real_)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(hydro_share),
         !is.na(co2_t_per_mwh),
         co2_t_per_mwh > 0)
```


```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(viridis)

ggplot(dta_prepped,
       aes(x = hydro_share, y = co2_t_per_mwh)) +
  geom_hex(bins = 40) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C", trans = "log10",
                       name = "Hours\nper bin") +
  geom_smooth(method = "gam", formula = y ~ s(x),
              color = "#2c7bb6", fill = "#2c7bb6",
              alpha = 0.2, size = 1.2) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
                     limits = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_y_log10(labels = scales::number_format(accuracy = 0.01)) +
  labs(
    title = "Extreme variability in hourly CO₂ intensity vs hydropower share",
    subtitle = "Each hex = many hours; blue line = smoothed relationship (tons CO₂ / MWh, log scale)",
    x = "Hydropower share of generation",
    y = "Stack CO₂ intensity (tCO₂ / MWh, log scale)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "right")
```



```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)

# 1. Prep: average hydropower by month × hour
hydro_sun <- dta %>%
  mutate(
    month_num = month,
    month_lab = factor(month.abb[month_num], levels = month.abb)
  ) %>%
  group_by(month_lab, month_num, hour) %>%
  summarise(h_mean = mean(h, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  # normalize for nicer color scale
  mutate(h_norm = h_mean / max(h_mean, na.rm = TRUE))

# 2. Sun plot: hour = angle, month = radius
ggplot(hydro_sun,
       aes(x = hour, y = month_num, fill = h_norm)) +
  geom_tile(color = NA) +
  coord_polar(theta = "x") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = 1:12,
    labels = month.abb,
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colours = c("#fff7bc", "#fee391", "#fec44f", "#fe9929", "#d95f0e", "#993404"),
    name = "Avg hydro\n(normalized)"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Hydropower \"sun\": when the dam is brightest",
    subtitle = "Rings = months, rays = hours; brighter = more hydropower generation",
    x = NULL, y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 8),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = "gray40")
  )
```



```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(viridis)

# ---------- SETTINGS ----------
inner_radius <- 1.5   # controls size of the inner month disc

# ---------- 1. INNER DISC: average hydro by MONTH ----------
inner_month <- dta %>%
  mutate(
    month_num = month(dt),
    month_lab = factor(month.abb[month_num], levels = month.abb)
  ) %>%
  group_by(month_lab) %>%
  summarise(h_mean = mean(h, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    h_norm = h_mean / max(h_mean, na.rm = TRUE)    # 0–1 normalization
  )

# Each month spans two hour-slots so wedges line up nicely with a 24-hour circle
month_slots <- tibble(
  month_lab = factor(month.abb, levels = month.abb),
  x_center  = seq(1, 23, by = 2)   # 12 centers, between 0–24
)

inner_month_long <- inner_month %>%
  inner_join(month_slots, by = "month_lab")

# ---------- 2. OUTER CORONA: average hydro by HOUR ----------
outer_hour <- dta %>%
  mutate(hour = hour(dt)) %>%
  group_by(hour) %>%
  summarise(h_mean = mean(h, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    h_norm  = h_mean / max(h_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    # rotate hours so that 12:00 sits at the top in coord_polar(start = 0)
    hour_rot = (hour - 12) %% 24,
    inner_r  = inner_radius + 0.1,
    outer_r  = inner_r + 0.9 * h_norm
  )

# ---------- 3. PLOT ----------
ggplot() +
  # INNER MONTH DISC (months as wide wedges)
  geom_col(
    data = inner_month_long,
    aes(x = x_center, y = inner_radius, fill = h_norm),
    width = 2,    # spans two "hour" units
    color = NA
  ) +
  # OUTER HOUR RAYS (24-hour corona)
  geom_segment(
    data = outer_hour,
    aes(x = hour_rot, xend = hour_rot,
        y = inner_r,  yend = outer_r,
        color = h_norm),
    lineend = "round",
    size = 1.0,
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  coord_polar(theta = "x", start = 0) +  # 0 (our rotated 12:00) at top
  # one shared color scale for both months and hours
  scale_colour_gradientn(
    colours = c("#fff7bc", "#fee391", "#fec44f", "#fe9929", "#d95f0e", "#993404"),
    name = "Avg hydropower\n(normalized)"
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colours = c("#fff7bc", "#fee391", "#fec44f", "#fe9929", "#d95f0e", "#993404"),
    guide  = "none"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, inner_radius + 1.3), breaks = NULL) +
  labs(
    title    = "Hydropower \"sun\": months at the core, hours as corona",
    subtitle = "Color = normalized hydropower generation (same scale for months and hours)\n12:00 is at the top of the circle",
    x = NULL, y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "right",
    axis.text         = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks        = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor  = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major  = element_blank(),
    plot.title        = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle     = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = "gray40")
  )
```
